description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a matte finish, designed to hold beer. The can features a dark, gradient color scheme that transitions between deep purple and brownish-black tones. One side of the can displays a subtle, minimalist graphic with the word 'Vênus' in a modern, light-colored font, accompanied by a faint silhouette of a figure. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab opening, and the surface appears smooth without any visible condensation. The overall design is sleek and understated, with minimal ornamentation aside from the main label. The can's proportions and style are typical of energy drink or craft beer cans found in urban environments.
description: A tall, slim, matte-finished aluminum beer can with a dark gradient color scheme and minimalist label design.
description_view_0: The can is shown with a clear view of its metallic top and a split gradient color scheme, transitioning from dark purple to brown.
description_view_1: This view highlights the can's smooth, uninterrupted dark surface, with no visible label or graphics.
description_view_2: The front label is visible, featuring the word 'Vênus' and a faint silhouette, set against a dark background.
description_view_3: The can is shown with a deep purple matte surface, with no visible graphics or text.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a minimalist design with a subtle silhouette and modern typography, set against a dark, gradient background. The overall style is sleek and understated, with limited use of color and ornamentation.
